mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO market_sector_member_snapshot (snapshot_id, canonical_symbol, security_name, current_price, previous_close, change_rate, net_inflow, turnover_amount, volume, total_shares, circulating_shares, tags, trade_status, is_delayed) VALUES
(#{item.snapshotId}, #{item.canonicalSymbol}, #{item.securityName}, #{item.currentPrice}, #{item.previousClose}, #{item.changeRate}, #{item.netInflow}, #{item.turnoverAmount}, #{item.volume}, #{item.totalShares}, #{item.circulatingShares}, #{item.tags}, #{item.tradeStatus}, #{item.delayed})
mapper.select: SELECT id, snapshot_id, canonical_symbol, security_name, current_price, previous_close, change_rate, net_inflow, turnover_amount, volume, total_shares, circulating_shares, tags, trade_status, is_delayed, created_at FROM market_sector_member_snapshot WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} ORDER BY net_inflow DESC, turnover_amount DESC, id ASC
